# QLThumbnailRepresentation

**Class**

Information about the thumbnail that the thumbnail generator returns.

## Declaration

```swift
class QLThumbnailRepresentation
```

## Overview

QuickLook Thumbnailing is a non-UI framework, so your app doesn’t have to link to either [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit] or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit]. Quicklook Thumbnailing generates a thumbnail as a Core Graphics image object and makes the thumbnail available as the [doc://com.apple.quicklookthumbnailing/documentation/QuickLookThumbnailing/QLThumbnailRepresentation/cgImage] property. If an app links to AppKit or UIKit, the thumbnail is available through the [doc://com.apple.quicklookthumbnailing/documentation/QuickLookThumbnailing/QLThumbnailRepresentation/nsImage] or [doc://com.apple.quicklookthumbnailing/documentation/QuickLookThumbnailing/QLThumbnailRepresentation/uiImage] properties.

For more information on the different types of thumbnails that [doc://com.apple.quicklookthumbnailing/documentation/QuickLookThumbnailing/QLThumbnailGenerator] can create, see [doc://com.apple.quicklookthumbnailing/documentation/QuickLookThumbnailing/QLThumbnailGenerator/Request/RepresentationTypes-swift.struct].

## Thumbnail Images

- **cgImage**: A thumbnail in the form of a Core Graphics image object.
- **nsImage**: A thumbnail in the form of an AppKit image object.
- **uiImage**: A thumbnail in the form of a UIKit image object.
- **type**: The type of thumbnail.
- **contentRect**: The rectangle within the thumbnail image of the document that represents its contents.
- **QLThumbnailRepresentation.RepresentationType**: The different types of thumbnails that you can create.

## Thumbnail Generation

- **Creating Quick Look Thumbnails to Preview Files in Your App**: Generate thumbnails of images, text files, PDFs, audio files, videos, and more.
- **QLThumbnailGenerator**: An object that generates thumbnail images based on provided requirements.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
